sub_fields.label: Background Video
sub_fields.name: background_video
sub_fields.instructions: Upload an MP4, WebM, or MOV file. Plays muted and loops automatically.

sub_fields.label: Show Group Tag
sub_fields.name: show_group_tag
sub_fields.instructions: Shows the “Part of the TravelSeen® Group” badge below the header. Homepage only.

sub_fields.label: TravelSeen Logo
sub_fields.name: group_tag_logo
sub_fields.instructions: White TravelSeen® wordmark shown in the group tag.

sub_fields.label: Primary Button
sub_fields.name: primary_link
sub_fields.instructions: For a phone button, set URL to tel:+442071234567 (no spaces, no http). Link text e.g. Call Us Now.

sub_fields.label: White Background
sub_fields.name: light_background
sub_fields.instructions: Use on resort pages (Sani/Ikos). Default is cream tint.

sub_fields.label: Section ID
sub_fields.name: section_id
sub_fields.instructions: Optional anchor ID for sticky nav links (e.g. experiences).

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Fallback plain-text heading. Ignored when a heading logo is set below.

sub_fields.label: Heading Logo
sub_fields.name: heading_logo
sub_fields.instructions: Inline wordmark within the heading (e.g. Travel Seen).

sub_fields.label: Post count
sub_fields.name: post_count
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Leave empty to use the default from Site Options → Instagram.

sub_fields.label: Background Video
sub_fields.name: background_video
sub_fields.instructions: Upload an MP4, WebM, or MOV file. Plays muted and loops automatically.

sub_fields.label: Section ID
sub_fields.name: section_id
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. rooms

sub_fields.label: Video Left
sub_fields.name: video_left
sub_fields.instructions: Upload an MP4, WebM file. Plays muted and loops automatically. Only used when Left Media Type is Video.

sub_fields.label: Video Right
sub_fields.name: video_right
sub_fields.instructions: Upload an MP4, WebM file. Plays muted and loops automatically. Only used when Right Media Type is Video.

sub_fields.label: Category
sub_fields.name: category
sub_fields.instructions: Must match a filter category name.

sub_fields.label: Bottom Left Image
sub_fields.name: image_bottom_left
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Leave empty to hide this slot.

sub_fields.label: Hero Video
sub_fields.name: hero_video
sub_fields.instructions: Upload an MP4, WebM, or MOV file.

sub_fields.label: Section ID
sub_fields.name: section_id
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. dining

sub_fields.label: Section ID
sub_fields.name: section_id
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. gallery

sub_fields.label: Images
sub_fields.name: images
sub_fields.instructions: Add 6 images. Set each Cell Size to place it in the masonry grid (Column 1–3, Top/Bottom). Order in the list does not matter.

sub_fields.label: Section ID
sub_fields.name: section_id
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. reviews

sub_fields.label: Background Video
sub_fields.name: background_video
sub_fields.instructions: Upload an MP4, WebM, or MOV file. Plays muted and loops automatically.

sub_fields.label: Button Link
sub_fields.name: whatsapp_link
sub_fields.instructions: Use a https://wa.me/ link. Button label comes from the link title (e.g. Open WhatsApp).

sub_fields.label: Contact Form 7 ID
sub_fields.name: form_id
sub_fields.instructions: Requires the Contact Form 7 plugin. Enter the form ID (Contact → Forms shows it in the shortcode, e.g. id="123").
